title: mitrephora rugosa
intro: Mitrephora rugosa is a species of plant in the family Annonaceae, native to Borneo and Sumatra, characterized by its unique wrinkled leaves and fragrant flowers. The plant is used in traditional medicine, particularly in Southeast Asia, for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Mitrephora rugosa include reducing fever, treating respiratory infections, and alleviating pain and inflammation, making it a valuable plant for holistic remedies. Herbal preparations of Mitrephora rugosa can be found in traditional remedies, such as infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, often used to treat various health conditions.
